prompt: Realistic style, ultra-high detail. An adult woman in her early 20s with natural long black hair, transparent and glowing skin, a natural smile, and a cute yet gorgeous face. The background is a path near a southern resort beach with white sand, coconut trees, tropical greenery, and the blue sea visible in the distance. The woman wears an elegant bikini in pale pink, showing an S-curve. A pure and cool atmosphere. She naturally smiles at the camera while looking back as she walks along the path. The figure occupies a large proportion of the frame, with the background softly blurred. The overall impression is a refreshing casual style. No text or logos added. Focus on an atmosphere of elegance, transparency, and high likability.
